---
title: "Metabolomics & Lipiomics_Analysis"
author: "Savanah leidholt"
date: "2026-03-27"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
#---------------------------------------------------
# inputting all directories and storage locations
#---------------------------------------------------
```{r}
#Directories
#computer <- "mac studio"
computer <- "mac laptop"
if (computer == "mac studio") {
  user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]
  if (user == "sleidholt") {
    dir.dat <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/")
    dir.results <- c("/Users/Shared/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/")
    git_path <- "/Users/sleidholt/Documents/GitHub/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad/PANTHER PFAS/"
  }
} else {
  user <- Sys.info()[["user"]]
  if (user == "savanahleidholt") {
    dir.dat <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/")
    dir.results <- c("/Users/savanahleidholt/OneDrive - UW/Laura Pyle's files - Biostatistics Core Shared Drive/Savanah Leidholt/")
    git_path <- "/Users/savanahleidholt/Desktop/CHCO-Code/Petter Bjornstad"
  } 
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# PATHWAY COMPARISON ACROSS 3 STUDY-ADJUSTED LIMMA MODELS
# all studies vs no ATTEMPT vs all-3-omics subset
# ============================================================

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(limma)
library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(EnhancedVolcano)

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------
contrasts <- c(
  "T1D_vs_LC", "T2D_vs_LC", "T1D_vs_T2D",
  "OC_vs_LC", "T1D_vs_OC", "T2D_vs_OC"
)
```

```{r}
# Identify participants with all three omics types
# Load your saved objects

omics_objects <- readRDS(file.path(dir.dat, "Savanah Leidholt", "T1D-T2D", "Data", "omics_split_objects3.rds"))
# ============================================================
# HELPER: count non-NA samples in a matrix for a given metadata
# ============================================================

count_samples_with_data <- function(meta_df, mat_df) {
  # A sample "has data" if it has at least one non-NA value in the omics matrix
  has_data <- rowSums(!is.na(mat_df)) > 0
  meta_df %>%
    mutate(has_omics = has_data) %>%
    filter(has_omics)
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 1) PER-OMICS SAMPLE COUNTS: Study x Group
# ============================================================

make_count_table <- function(meta_df, mat_df, omics_label) {
  count_samples_with_data(meta_df, mat_df) %>%
    count(study, group) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = group, values_from = n, values_fill = 0) %>%
    arrange(study) %>%
    mutate(Omics = omics_label, .before = 1)
}

tbl_metabolites <- make_count_table(omics_objects$meta_metab, omics_objects$metabolites,  "Metabolomics")
tbl_lipids      <- make_count_table(omics_objects$meta_lips,  omics_objects$lipids,        "Lipidomics")
tbl_proteins    <- make_count_table(omics_objects$meta_prot,  omics_objects$prot_plasma,   "Proteomics (Plasma)")

cat("\n===== METABOLOMICS: Samples per Study x Group =====\n")
print(tbl_metabolites)

cat("\n===== LIPIDOMICS: Samples per Study x Group =====\n")
print(tbl_lipids)

cat("\n===== PROTEOMICS (Plasma): Samples per Study x Group =====\n")
print(tbl_proteins)
```

```{r}
# ---- get IDs WITH data ----
get_ids_with_data <- function(mat, meta) {
  ids <- rownames(mat)[rowSums(!is.na(mat)) > 0]
  ids <- trimws(as.character(ids))
  
  meta %>%
    mutate(record_id = trimws(as.character(record_id))) %>%
    filter(record_id %in% ids) %>%
    distinct(record_id) %>%  
    pull(record_id)
}

ids_metab  <- get_ids_with_data(omics_objects$metabolites, omics_objects$meta_metab)
ids_lipids <- get_ids_with_data(omics_objects$lipids,      omics_objects$meta_lips)
ids_prot   <- get_ids_with_data(omics_objects$prot_plasma, omics_objects$meta_prot)

ids_all_three <- Reduce(intersect, list(ids_metab, ids_lipids, ids_prot))

cat("Total UNIQUE participants with all 3 omics:", length(ids_all_three), "\n")
```
# ============================================================
# STREAMLINED METABOLOMICS / LIPIDOMICS WORKFLOW
# Similar to proteomics workflow, without extra clinical plots
# ============================================================
```{r}
# CHOOSE OMICS LAYER

#omics_name <- "lipidomics"
omics_name <- "metabolomics"

if (omics_name == "lipidomics") {
  meta <- omics_objects$meta_lips
  mat  <- omics_objects$lipids
} else if (omics_name == "metabolomics") {
  meta <- omics_objects$meta_metab
  mat  <- omics_objects$metabolites
} else {
  stop("omics_name must be 'lipidomics' or 'metabolomics'")
}
```
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# CLEAN METADATA
# ------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
meta$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta$record_id))
meta$study     <- trimws(as.character(meta$study))
meta$group     <- trimws(as.character(meta$group))
meta$sex       <- trimws(as.character(meta$sex))

meta$age <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta$age))
meta$bmi <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta$bmi))

keep <- !is.na(meta$age) & !is.na(meta$sex) & meta$sex != ""
meta <- meta[keep, , drop = FALSE]

meta$group4 <- factor(
  meta$group,
  levels = c("Lean Control","Obese Control","Type 1 Diabetes","Type 2 Diabetes"),
  labels = c("LC","OC","T1D","T2D")
)

meta$study6 <- dplyr::recode(
  meta$study,
  "CROCODILE"       = "CRC",
  "RENAL-HEIR"      = "RH",
  "IMPROVE"         = "IT",
  "RENAL-HEIRitage" = "RH2",
  .default = meta$study
)
meta$study6 <- factor(meta$study6)
meta$sex    <- factor(meta$sex)

meta_common <- meta
```
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# ALIGN METADATA TO MATRIX
# ------------------------------------------------------------

```{r}
meta_common$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta_common$record_id))
rownames(mat) <- trimws(as.character(rownames(mat)))

olap <- intersect(meta_common$record_id, rownames(mat))
cat("Overlap samples:", length(olap), "\n")
stopifnot(length(olap) > 0)

meta_common <- meta_common[match(olap, meta_common$record_id), , drop = FALSE]
mat_common  <- mat[olap, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(meta_common$record_id, rownames(mat_common)))

cat("Analysis-ready N:", nrow(meta_common), "\n")
cat("Features before filtering:", ncol(mat_common), "\n")
print(table(meta_common$study, meta_common$group4, useNA = "ifany"))
```
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA PREP
# ------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
meta_pca <- meta_common
mat_pca  <- mat_common[meta_pca$record_id, , drop = FALSE]
stopifnot(identical(rownames(mat_pca), meta_pca$record_id))
mat_pca <- as.matrix(mat_pca)

# check if log2(x + 1) is appropriate
if (min(mat_pca, na.rm = TRUE) < 0) {
  stop("Matrix contains negative values; do not use log2(x + 1) without checking preprocessing.")
}

# log transform the data
mat_log <- log2(mat_pca + 1)
mat_log[!is.finite(mat_log)] <- NA_real_


# filter features by missingness BEFORE imputation

study_vec <- meta_pca$study6
names(study_vec) <- rownames(mat_pca)

# function: does a feature have data in a given study?
feature_present_by_study <- function(x, study_vec) {
  tapply(!is.na(x), study_vec, function(v) any(v))  # any non-NA in that study
}

# matrix: features x studies (TRUE/FALSE)
present_mat <- apply(mat_log, 2, feature_present_by_study, study_vec = study_vec)

# number of studies each feature is observed in
n_studies_present <- colSums(present_mat)

# keep features present in >= 2 studies
keep_study <- n_studies_present >= 2

cat("Features before study filter:", ncol(mat_log), "\n")
cat("Features removed (<2 studies):", sum(!keep_study), "\n")
cat("Features kept (>=2 studies):", sum(keep_study), "\n")

mat_filt <- mat_log[, keep_study, drop = FALSE]


# median imputation after missingness filtering
mat_imp <- mat_filt
meds <- apply(mat_imp, 2, function(x) {
  m <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(m)) m else NA_real_
})

for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat_imp))) {
  if (!is.na(meds[j])) {
    mat_imp[is.na(mat_imp[, j]), j] <- meds[j]
  }
}


# remove any remaining bad columns
vars <- apply(mat_imp, 2, var)

keep_cols <- colSums(is.na(mat_imp)) == 0 &
  vars > 0 &
  is.finite(vars)

mat_imp <- mat_imp[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

cat("Features kept for PCA:", ncol(mat_imp), "\n")
```


# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA HELPER
# ------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
make_pca_plot <- function(mat_in, meta_df, title_str) {
  pca  <- prcomp(mat_in, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
  vexp <- round(100 * (pca$sdev^2) / sum(pca$sdev^2), 1)

  tibble(
    PC1    = pca$x[, 1],
    PC2    = pca$x[, 2],
    group4 = meta_df$group4,
    study  = meta_df$study6
  ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(PC1, PC2, color = group4, shape = study)) +
    geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c(
        LC  = "#2166AC",
        OC  = "#F4A582",
        T1D = "#D6604D",
        T2D = "#4DAC26"
      ),
      name = "Group"
    ) +
    labs(
      title = title_str,
      x = paste0("PC1 (", vexp[1], "%)"),
      y = paste0("PC2 (", vexp[2], "%)")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA PANELS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p0 <- make_pca_plot(mat_imp, meta_pca, paste(omics_name, "- No adjustment"))

cov_m1 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex, data = meta_pca)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_m1 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp), covariates = cov_m1))
p1 <- make_pca_plot(mat_m1, meta_pca, paste(omics_name, "- Age + Sex"))

cov_m2 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex + study6, data = meta_pca)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_m2 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp), covariates = cov_m2))
p2 <- make_pca_plot(mat_m2, meta_pca, paste(omics_name, "- Age + Sex + Study"))

(p0 | p1 | p2) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = paste("PCA:", omics_name),
    subtitle = "Color = group | Shape = study | removeBatchEffect used for visualization only",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40")
    )
  )

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# LIMMA HELPERS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
run_limma_contrasts <- function(Y, design, contr) {
  fit <- lmFit(Y, design)
  fit2 <- contrasts.fit(fit, contr)
  fit2 <- eBayes(fit2)

  out <- setNames(vector("list", ncol(contr)), colnames(contr))
  for (cc in colnames(contr)) {
    tt <- topTable(fit2, coef = cc, number = Inf, adjust.method = "BH", sort.by = "P")
    tt$feature_id <- rownames(tt)
    tt$contrast <- cc
    out[[cc]] <- tt
  }
  list(fit = fit2, out = out)
}

summarise_sig <- function(out_list, model_label, n_samp) {
  tibble(
    contrast = names(out_list),
    n_FDR05  = sapply(out_list, function(tt) sum(tt$adj.P.Val < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)),
    n_FDR01  = sapply(out_list, function(tt) sum(tt$adj.P.Val < 0.01, na.rm = TRUE)),
    model    = model_label,
    n_samples = n_samp
  )
}

make_my_contrasts <- function(design) {
  makeContrasts(
    T1D_vs_LC  = T1D - LC,
    T2D_vs_LC  = T2D - LC,
    T1D_vs_T2D = T1D - T2D,
    OC_vs_LC   = OC  - LC,
    T1D_vs_OC  = T1D - OC,
    T2D_vs_OC  = T2D - OC,
    levels = design
  )
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# LIMMA: ALL STUDIES
# ------------------------------------------------------------
Y_all <- t(log2(as.matrix(mat_common) + 1))

# age + sex
meta_m1 <- meta_common
Y_m1 <- Y_all[, meta_m1$record_id, drop = FALSE]

design_m1 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex, data = meta_m1)
colnames(design_m1) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m1))
colnames(design_m1) <- make.names(colnames(design_m1))

contr_m1 <- make_my_contrasts(design_m1)

res_m1 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_m1, design_m1, contr_m1)
fit_m1 <- res_m1$fit
out_m1 <- res_m1$out
sig_m1 <- summarise_sig(out_m1, paste0(omics_name, "_age_sex"), nrow(meta_m1))

# age + sex + study
meta_m2 <- meta_common %>% filter(!is.na(study6))
Y_m2 <- Y_all[, meta_m2$record_id, drop = FALSE]

design_m2 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex + study6, data = meta_m2)
colnames(design_m2) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m2))
colnames(design_m2) <- make.names(colnames(design_m2))

contr_m2 <- make_my_contrasts(design_m2)

res_m2 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_m2, design_m2, contr_m2)
fit_m2 <- res_m2$fit
out_m2 <- res_m2$out
sig_m2 <- summarise_sig(out_m2, paste0(omics_name, "_age_sex_study"), nrow(meta_m2))

summary_all <- bind_rows(sig_m1, sig_m2) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, n_samples, contrast, n_FDR05, n_FDR01) %>%
  arrange(contrast, model)

print(summary_all)
```
```{r}
make_volcano <- function(out_list, contrast_name, subtitle_txt = "Age + sex + study") {
  
  tt <- out_list[[contrast_name]]
  
  EnhancedVolcano::EnhancedVolcano(
    tt,
    lab = tt$feature_id,
    x = "logFC",
    y = "adj.P.Val",
    pCutoff = 0.05,
    FCcutoff = 1,
    title = gsub("_", " ", contrast_name),
    subtitle = subtitle_txt,
    pointSize = 2.0,
    labSize = 3.0
  )
}

contrast_names <- c(
  "T1D_vs_LC", "T2D_vs_LC", "T1D_vs_T2D",
  "OC_vs_LC", "T1D_vs_OC", "T2D_vs_OC"
)

volcano_list <- lapply(contrast_names, function(cc) {
  make_volcano(out_m2, cc)
})

names(volcano_list) <- contrast_names

patchwork::wrap_plots(volcano_list, ncol = 3)
```

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# OPTIONAL SENSITIVITY: ALL-OMICS SUBSET
# ------------------------------------------------------------
```{r}
# BUILD ALL-3 SUBSET
ids_all_three <- trimws(as.character(ids_all_three))

meta_all3 <- meta_common %>%
  mutate(record_id = trimws(as.character(record_id))) %>%
  filter(record_id %in% ids_all_three)

# keep matrix rows in same order as metadata
mat_all3 <- mat_common[meta_all3$record_id, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(nrow(mat_all3) == nrow(meta_all3))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(mat_all3), meta_all3$record_id))

cat("All-3 subset features before filtering:", ncol(mat_all3), "\n")
cat("All-3 subset N:", nrow(meta_all3), "\n")

# proteomics + metabolomics subset only
ids_metab_prot <- Reduce(intersect, list(ids_metab, ids_prot))

cat("Total with proteomics + metabolomics:", length(ids_metab_prot), "\n")
```


```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA PREP: subset
# ------------------------------------------------------------
mat_pca_all3 <- as.matrix(mat_all3)

if (min(mat_pca_all3, na.rm = TRUE) < 0) {
  stop("Matrix contains negative values; do not use log2(x + 1) without checking preprocessing.")
}

mat_log_all3 <- log2(mat_pca_all3 + 1)
mat_log_all3[!is.finite(mat_log_all3)] <- NA_real_

# make sure metadata still matches matrix rows
stopifnot(nrow(mat_log_all3) == nrow(meta_all3))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(mat_log_all3), meta_all3$record_id))

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# STUDY-AWARE FEATURE FILTER
# keep features present in >= 2 studies
# ------------------------------------------------------------
study_vec <- as.character(meta_all3$study6)

study_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(mat_log_all3)), study_vec)

present_by_study <- sapply(study_idx, function(idx) {
  colSums(!is.na(mat_log_all3[idx, , drop = FALSE])) > 0
})

present_by_study <- as.matrix(present_by_study)

# rows = features, cols = studies
n_studies_present <- rowSums(present_by_study)

keep_study <- n_studies_present >= 2

cat("Features before study filter:", ncol(mat_log_all3), "\n")
cat("Features removed (<2 studies):", sum(!keep_study), "\n")
cat("Features kept (>=2 studies):", sum(keep_study), "\n")

mat_filt_all3 <- mat_log_all3[, keep_study, drop = FALSE]

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# MEDIAN IMPUTATION
# ------------------------------------------------------------
mat_imp_all3 <- mat_filt_all3

meds_all3 <- apply(mat_imp_all3, 2, function(x) {
  m <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(m)) m else NA_real_
})

for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat_imp_all3))) {
  if (!is.na(meds_all3[j])) {
    mat_imp_all3[is.na(mat_imp_all3[, j]), j] <- meds_all3[j]
  }
}

# ------------------------------------------------------------
# REMOVE BAD COLUMNS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
vars_all3 <- apply(mat_imp_all3, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)

keep_cols_all3 <- colSums(is.na(mat_imp_all3)) == 0 &
  vars_all3 > 0 &
  is.finite(vars_all3)

mat_imp_all3 <- mat_imp_all3[, keep_cols_all3, drop = FALSE]

cat("Features kept for PCA:", ncol(mat_imp_all3), "\n")
cat("Samples for PCA:", nrow(mat_imp_all3), "\n")

# final safety checks
stopifnot(nrow(mat_imp_all3) == nrow(meta_all3))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(mat_imp_all3), meta_all3$record_id))

if (ncol(mat_imp_all3) < 2) {
  stop("Need at least 2 features after filtering for PCA.")
}
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA PANELS: all-3 subset
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p0_all3 <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_imp_all3,
  meta_all3,
  paste(omics_name, "- No adjustment (all-3 subset)")
)

cov_m1_all3 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex, data = meta_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_m1_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp_all3), covariates = cov_m1_all3))
p1_all3 <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_m1_all3,
  meta_all3,
  paste(omics_name, "- Age + Sex (all-3 subset)")
)

cov_m2_all3 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex + study6, data = meta_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_m2_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp_all3), covariates = cov_m2_all3))
p2_all3 <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_m2_all3,
  meta_all3,
  paste(omics_name, "- Age + Sex + Study (all-3 subset)")
)

cov_m3_all3 <- model.matrix(~ study6, data = meta_all3)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_m3_all3 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp_all3), covariates = cov_m3_all3))
p3_all3 <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_m3_all3,
  meta_all3,
  paste(omics_name, "-Study (all-3 subset)")
)

(p0_all3 | p1_all3 | p2_all3 | p3_all3) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = paste("PCA:", omics_name, "(all-3 subset)"),
    subtitle = "Color = group | Shape = study | removeBatchEffect used for visualization only",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40")
    )
  )
```
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# LIMMA: all-3 subset
# ------------------------------------------------------------

# align metadata to the matrix actually being modeled
meta_all3 <- meta_all3 %>%
  mutate(record_id = trimws(as.character(record_id)))

meta_all3 <- meta_all3[match(rownames(mat_imp_all3), meta_all3$record_id), , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(nrow(mat_imp_all3) == nrow(meta_all3))
stopifnot(identical(rownames(mat_imp_all3), meta_all3$record_id))

# mat_imp_all3 is already log2-transformed and imputed
Y_all_all3 <- t(as.matrix(mat_imp_all3))

design_m2_all3 <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex + study6, data = meta_all3)
colnames(design_m2_all3) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_m2_all3))
colnames(design_m2_all3) <- make.names(colnames(design_m2_all3))

contr_m2_all3 <- make_my_contrasts(design_m2_all3)

res_m2_all3 <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_all_all3, design_m2_all3, contr_m2_all3)
fit_m2_all3 <- res_m2_all3$fit
out_m2_all3 <- res_m2_all3$out
sig_m2_all3 <- summarise_sig(
  out_m2_all3,
  paste0(omics_name, "_age_sex_study_all3"),
  nrow(meta_all3)
)

print(sig_m2_all3)
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# VOLCANO PLOTS: all-3 subset
# ------------------------------------------------------------
make_volcano <- function(out_list,
                         contrast_name,
                         subtitle_txt = "Age + sex + study (MultiOmics subset)",
                         fc_cutoff = 0.5,
                         p_cutoff = 0.05) {
  
  tt <- out_list[[contrast_name]]
  
  EnhancedVolcano::EnhancedVolcano(
    tt,
    lab = tt$feature_id,
    x = "logFC",
    y = "adj.P.Val",
    pCutoff = p_cutoff,
    FCcutoff = fc_cutoff,
    title = gsub("_", " ", contrast_name),
    subtitle = subtitle_txt,
    pointSize = 2.0,
    labSize = 3.0
  )
}

contrast_names <- c(
  "T1D_vs_LC", "T2D_vs_LC", "T1D_vs_T2D",
  "OC_vs_LC", "T1D_vs_OC", "T2D_vs_OC"
)

volcano_list <- lapply(contrast_names, function(cc) {
  make_volcano(out_m2_all3, cc)
})

names(volcano_list) <- contrast_names

patchwork::wrap_plots(volcano_list, ncol = 3)


```
```{r}
study_vec <- meta_common$study6
ref_studies <- c("IT", "RH", "RH2")
study_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(mat_common)), study_vec)

#original df of cleaned lipids >= 2 studies
lipid_presence <- as.data.frame(lipid_presence)

# count number of lipids per study
lipids_per_study <- colSums(lipid_presence)
lipids_per_study

# presence matrix: lipids x studies reduce CRC lipids to those common in IT, RH, RH2
present_by_study <- sapply(study_idx, function(idx) {
  colSums(!is.na(mat_common[idx, , drop = FALSE])) > 0
})

present_by_study <- as.matrix(present_by_study)

lipid_presence <- sapply(study_idx, function(idx) {
  colSums(!is.na(mat_common[idx, , drop = FALSE])) > 0
})

keep_ref <- rowSums(present_by_study[, ref_studies, drop = FALSE]) == length(ref_studies)

#original df of cleaned lipids >= 2 studies
lipid_presence <- as.data.frame(lipid_presence)

# count number of lipids per study
lipids_per_study <- colSums(lipid_presence)
lipids_per_study
```

```{r}
mat_common_ref <- mat_common[, keep_ref, drop = FALSE]

cat("Original features:", ncol(mat_common), "\n")
cat("Filtered features (reference panel):", ncol(mat_common_ref), "\n")
```

```{r}
study_vec <- meta_common$study6
study_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(mat_common)), study_vec)
omics_by_study <- lapply(study_idx, function(idx) {
  colnames(mat_common)[colSums(!is.na(mat_common[idx, , drop = FALSE])) > 0]
})
common_all <- Reduce(intersect, omics_by_study)
length(common_all)


all_lipids <- Reduce(union, omics_by_study)
length(all_lipids)

lipid_table <- table(unlist(omics_by_study))
sum(lipid_table >= 2)
```
```{r}
#pairwise overlap
studies <- names(omics_by_study)

overlap_mat <- matrix(0, nrow = length(studies), ncol = length(studies),
                      dimnames = list(studies, studies))

for (i in seq_along(studies)) {
  for (j in seq_along(studies)) {
    overlap_mat[i, j] <- length(
      intersect(omics_by_study[[i]], omics_by_study[[j]])
    )
  }
}

overlap_mat
```


```{r}
#coverage_df <- meta_common %>%
 # mutate(
  #  n_lipids = rowSums(!is.na(mat_common))
  #)

#coverage_df2 <- meta_common %>%
 # mutate(n_lipids = rowSums(!is.na(mat_common_ref)))

#aggregate(n_lipids ~ study6, data = coverage_df, summary)
```


```{r}
#p1 <- ggplot(coverage_df, aes(x = study6, y = n_lipids, fill = study6)) +
 # geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
  #geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
  #theme_bw() +
  #labs(
   # title = "Lipid coverage per sample by study",
  #  x = "Study",
   # y = "Number of detected lipids"
  #) +
  #theme(legend.position = "none")

#p2 <- ggplot(coverage_df2, aes(x = study6, y = n_lipids, fill = study6)) +
#  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
#  geom_jitter(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.5, size = 1.5) +
 # theme_bw() +
 # labs(
  #  title = "Lipid coverage per sample by study",
   # x = "Study",
  #  y = "Number of detected lipids"
  #) +
  #theme(legend.position = "none")

#p1 | p2
```

# ============================================================
# SEPARATE SENSITIVITY ANALYSIS:
# SHARED PROTEOMICS + METABOLOMICS SAMPLES ONLY
# ============================================================
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# IDENTIFY SHARED PROTEOMICS + METABOLOMICS IDS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ids_metab_prot <- Reduce(intersect, list(ids_metab, ids_prot))
ids_metab_prot <- trimws(as.character(ids_metab_prot))

cat("Total UNIQUE participants with proteomics + metabolomics:",
    length(ids_metab_prot), "\n")
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# BUILD METABOLOMICS SUBSET ON SHARED IDS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
meta_metab_pm <- omics_objects$meta_metab
mat_metab_pm  <- omics_objects$metabolites

meta_metab_pm$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta_metab_pm$record_id))
meta_metab_pm$study     <- trimws(as.character(meta_metab_pm$study))
meta_metab_pm$group     <- trimws(as.character(meta_metab_pm$group))
meta_metab_pm$sex       <- trimws(as.character(meta_metab_pm$sex))

meta_metab_pm$age <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta_metab_pm$age))
meta_metab_pm$bmi <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta_metab_pm$bmi))

keep <- !is.na(meta_metab_pm$age) & !is.na(meta_metab_pm$sex) & meta_metab_pm$sex != ""
meta_metab_pm <- meta_metab_pm[keep, , drop = FALSE]

meta_metab_pm$group4 <- factor(
  meta_metab_pm$group,
  levels = c("Lean Control","Obese Control","Type 1 Diabetes","Type 2 Diabetes"),
  labels = c("LC","OC","T1D","T2D")
)

meta_metab_pm$study6 <- dplyr::recode(
  meta_metab_pm$study,
  "CROCODILE"       = "CRC",
  "RENAL-HEIR"      = "RH",
  "IMPROVE"         = "IT",
  "RENAL-HEIRitage" = "RH2",
  .default = meta_metab_pm$study
)

meta_metab_pm$study6 <- factor(meta_metab_pm$study6)
meta_metab_pm$sex    <- factor(meta_metab_pm$sex)

rownames(mat_metab_pm) <- trimws(as.character(rownames(mat_metab_pm)))

ids_use_metab_pm <- intersect(ids_metab_prot, intersect(meta_metab_pm$record_id, rownames(mat_metab_pm)))

meta_metab_pm <- meta_metab_pm[match(ids_use_metab_pm, meta_metab_pm$record_id), , drop = FALSE]
mat_metab_pm  <- mat_metab_pm[ids_use_metab_pm, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(meta_metab_pm$record_id, rownames(mat_metab_pm)))

cat("Metabolomics shared subset N:", nrow(meta_metab_pm), "\n")
cat("Metabolomics shared subset features before filtering:", ncol(mat_metab_pm), "\n")
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# BUILD PROTEOMICS SUBSET ON SAME SHARED IDS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
meta_prot_pm <- omics_objects$meta_prot
mat_prot_pm  <- omics_objects$prot_plasma

meta_prot_pm$record_id <- trimws(as.character(meta_prot_pm$record_id))
meta_prot_pm$study     <- trimws(as.character(meta_prot_pm$study))
meta_prot_pm$group     <- trimws(as.character(meta_prot_pm$group))
meta_prot_pm$sex       <- trimws(as.character(meta_prot_pm$sex))

meta_prot_pm$age <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta_prot_pm$age))
meta_prot_pm$bmi <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(meta_prot_pm$bmi))

keep <- !is.na(meta_prot_pm$age) & !is.na(meta_prot_pm$sex) & meta_prot_pm$sex != ""
meta_prot_pm <- meta_prot_pm[keep, , drop = FALSE]

meta_prot_pm$group4 <- factor(
  meta_prot_pm$group,
  levels = c("Lean Control","Obese Control","Type 1 Diabetes","Type 2 Diabetes"),
  labels = c("LC","OC","T1D","T2D")
)

meta_prot_pm$study6 <- dplyr::recode(
  meta_prot_pm$study,
  "ATTEMPT"        = "ATT",
  "CROCODILE"       = "CRC",
  "RENAL-HEIR"      = "RH",
  "IMPROVE"         = "IT",
  "RENAL-HEIRitage" = "RH2",
  .default = meta_prot_pm$study
)

meta_prot_pm$study6 <- factor(meta_prot_pm$study6)
meta_prot_pm$sex    <- factor(meta_prot_pm$sex)

rownames(mat_prot_pm) <- trimws(as.character(rownames(mat_prot_pm)))

ids_use_prot_pm <- intersect(ids_metab_prot, intersect(meta_prot_pm$record_id, rownames(mat_prot_pm)))

meta_prot_pm <- meta_prot_pm[match(ids_use_prot_pm, meta_prot_pm$record_id), , drop = FALSE]
mat_prot_pm  <- mat_prot_pm[ids_use_prot_pm, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(meta_prot_pm$record_id, rownames(mat_prot_pm)))

cat("Proteomics shared subset N:", nrow(meta_prot_pm), "\n")
```
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# KEEP ONLY IDS PRESENT IN BOTH CLEANED SUBSETS
# ------------------------------------------------------------
ids_pm_final <- intersect(meta_metab_pm$record_id, meta_prot_pm$record_id)

meta_metab_pm <- meta_metab_pm[match(ids_pm_final, meta_metab_pm$record_id), , drop = FALSE]
mat_metab_pm  <- mat_metab_pm[ids_pm_final, , drop = FALSE]

meta_prot_pm <- meta_prot_pm[match(ids_pm_final, meta_prot_pm$record_id), , drop = FALSE]
mat_prot_pm  <- mat_prot_pm[ids_pm_final, , drop = FALSE]

stopifnot(identical(meta_metab_pm$record_id, rownames(mat_metab_pm)))
stopifnot(identical(meta_prot_pm$record_id, rownames(mat_prot_pm)))
stopifnot(identical(meta_metab_pm$record_id, meta_prot_pm$record_id))

cat("Final shared proteomics + metabolomics N:", length(ids_pm_final), "\n")
```
```{r}
tbl_metab_pm <- meta_metab_pm %>%
  count(study6, group4) %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = group4,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Total = rowSums(across(c(LC, OC, T1D, T2D)))
  ) %>%
  arrange(study6)

tbl_metab_pm
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PREP METABOLOMICS MATRIX FOR PCA / LIMMA
# ------------------------------------------------------------
mat_pca_metab_pm <- as.matrix(mat_metab_pm)

if (min(mat_pca_metab_pm, na.rm = TRUE) < 0) {
  stop("Metabolomics matrix contains negative values; do not use log2(x + 1).")
}

mat_log_metab_pm <- log2(mat_pca_metab_pm + 1)
mat_log_metab_pm[!is.finite(mat_log_metab_pm)] <- NA_real_

study_vec <- as.character(meta_metab_pm$study6)
study_idx <- split(seq_len(nrow(mat_log_metab_pm)), study_vec)

present_by_study <- sapply(study_idx, function(idx) {
  colSums(!is.na(mat_log_metab_pm[idx, , drop = FALSE])) > 0
})

present_by_study <- as.matrix(present_by_study)
n_studies_present <- rowSums(present_by_study)
keep_study <- n_studies_present >= 2

cat("Metabolomics features before study filter:", ncol(mat_log_metab_pm), "\n")
cat("Metabolomics features removed (<2 studies):", sum(!keep_study), "\n")
cat("Metabolomics features kept:", sum(keep_study), "\n")

mat_filt_metab_pm <- mat_log_metab_pm[, keep_study, drop = FALSE]

meds_metab_pm <- apply(mat_filt_metab_pm, 2, function(x) {
  m <- median(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  if (is.finite(m)) m else NA_real_
})

mat_imp_metab_pm <- mat_filt_metab_pm
for (j in seq_len(ncol(mat_imp_metab_pm))) {
  if (!is.na(meds_metab_pm[j])) {
    mat_imp_metab_pm[is.na(mat_imp_metab_pm[, j]), j] <- meds_metab_pm[j]
  }
}

vars_metab_pm <- apply(mat_imp_metab_pm, 2, var, na.rm = TRUE)

keep_cols_metab_pm <- colSums(is.na(mat_imp_metab_pm)) == 0 &
  vars_metab_pm > 0 &
  is.finite(vars_metab_pm)

mat_imp_metab_pm <- mat_imp_metab_pm[, keep_cols_metab_pm, drop = FALSE]

cat("Metabolomics features kept for PCA/limma:", ncol(mat_imp_metab_pm), "\n")
```

```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# PCA: METABOLOMICS ON SHARED PROT+METAB SUBSET
# ------------------------------------------------------------
p0_metab_pm <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_imp_metab_pm,
  meta_metab_pm,
  "Metabolomics - No adjustment (proteomics+metabolomics subset)"
)

cov_metab_pm1 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex, data = meta_metab_pm)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_metab_pm1 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp_metab_pm), covariates = cov_metab_pm1))
p1_metab_pm <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_metab_pm1,
  meta_metab_pm,
  "Metabolomics - Age + Sex (proteomics+metabolomics subset)"
)

cov_metab_pm2 <- model.matrix(~ age + sex + study6, data = meta_metab_pm)[, -1, drop = FALSE]
mat_metab_pm2 <- t(removeBatchEffect(t(mat_imp_metab_pm), covariates = cov_metab_pm2))
p2_metab_pm <- make_pca_plot(
  mat_metab_pm2,
  meta_metab_pm,
  "Metabolomics - Age + Sex + Study (proteomics+metabolomics subset)"
)

(p0_metab_pm | p1_metab_pm | p2_metab_pm) +
  plot_annotation(
    title = "PCA: Metabolomics (proteomics+metabolomics subset)",
    subtitle = "Color = group | Shape = study | removeBatchEffect used for visualization only",
    theme = theme(
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
      plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 9, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey40")
    )
  )
```
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# LIMMA: METABOLOMICS ON SHARED PROT+METAB SUBSET
# ------------------------------------------------------------
Y_metab_pm <- t(as.matrix(mat_imp_metab_pm))

design_metab_pm <- model.matrix(~ 0 + group4 + age + sex + study6, data = meta_metab_pm)
colnames(design_metab_pm) <- sub("^group4", "", colnames(design_metab_pm))
colnames(design_metab_pm) <- make.names(colnames(design_metab_pm))

contr_metab_pm <- make_my_contrasts(design_metab_pm)

res_metab_pm <- run_limma_contrasts(Y_metab_pm, design_metab_pm, contr_metab_pm)
out_metab_pm <- res_metab_pm$out

sig_metab_pm <- summarise_sig(
  out_metab_pm,
  "metabolomics_age_sex_study_proteomics_metabolomics_subset",
  nrow(meta_metab_pm)
)

print(sig_metab_pm)
```
```{r}
# ------------------------------------------------------------
# VOLCANO PLOTS: METABOLOMICS ON SHARED PROT+METAB SUBSET
# ------------------------------------------------------------
volcano_list_metab_pm <- lapply(contrast_names, function(cc) {
  make_volcano(
    out_metab_pm,
    cc,
    subtitle_txt = "Age + sex + study (proteomics + metabolomics subset)",
    fc_cutoff = 0.5,
    p_cutoff = 0.05
  )
})

names(volcano_list_metab_pm) <- contrast_names

patchwork::wrap_plots(volcano_list_metab_pm, ncol = 3)
```
